'''âv-v-w''' ('''kavavaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valedict|valedict]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valedict|valedict]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-v-w
|-
! Lemma
| kavavaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivavaw|thivavaw]] || [[word:jivavaw|jivavaw]] || [[word:shivavaw|shivavaw]] || [[word:kivavaw|kivavaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvavaw|thuthuvavaw]] || [[word:jujuvavaw|jujuvavaw]] || [[word:shushuvavaw|shushuvavaw]] || [[word:kukuvavaw|kukuvavaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvavaw|thuvavaw]] || [[word:juvavaw|juvavaw]] || [[word:shuvavaw|shuvavaw]] || [[word:kuvavaw|kuvavaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvavaw|thuvavaw]] || [[word:juvavaw|juvavaw]] || [[word:shuvavaw|shuvavaw]] || [[word:kuvavaw|kuvavaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevavaw|thevavaw]] || [[word:jevavaw|jevavaw]] || [[word:shevavaw|shevavaw]] || [[word:kevavaw|kevavaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovavaw|thothovavaw]] || [[word:jojovavaw|jojovavaw]] || [[word:shoshovavaw|shoshovavaw]] || [[word:kokovavaw|kokovavaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovavaw|thovavaw]] || [[word:jovavaw|jovavaw]] || [[word:shovavaw|shovavaw]] || [[word:kovavaw|kovavaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovavaw|thovavaw]] || [[word:jovavaw|jovavaw]] || [[word:shovavaw|shovavaw]] || [[word:kovavaw|kovavaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvavaw|thĂŠvavaw]] || [[word:jĂŠvavaw|jĂŠvavaw]] || [[word:shĂŠvavaw|shĂŠvavaw]] || [[word:kĂŠvavaw|kĂŠvavaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavavaw|thathavavaw]] || [[word:jajavavaw|jajavavaw]] || [[word:shashavavaw|shashavavaw]] || [[word:kakavavaw|kakavavaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavavaw|thavavaw]] || [[word:javavaw|javavaw]] || [[word:shavavaw|shavavaw]] || [[word:kavavaw|kavavaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavavaw|thavavaw]] || [[word:javavaw|javavaw]] || [[word:shavavaw|shavavaw]] || [[word:kavavaw|kavavaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavavaw|shavavaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavavaw|goshavavaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavavaw|gokishavavaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavavawnĂŒ|shavavawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavavawnknĂŒ|goshavavawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavawnĂŒ|gokishavavawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavavawshĂ«|shavavawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavavawnkshĂ«|goshavavawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavavawshĂ«|gokishavavawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavawro|shavavawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavawnkro|goshavavawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavawro|gokishavavawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavawmu|shavavawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavawnkmu|goshavavawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavawmu|gokishavavawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavavawsher|shavavawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavavawnksher|goshavavawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavavawsher|gokishavavawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavavawng|shavavawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavavawnkng|goshavavawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavavawng|gokishavavawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavavawya|shavavawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavavawnkya|goshavavawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavavawya|gokishavavawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavavawyam|shavavawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavavawnkyam|goshavavawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavavawyam|gokishavavawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavavawnĂŒshĂ«|shavavawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavavawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavavawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavavawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavavawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavawnĂŒro|shavavawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavawnknĂŒro|goshavavawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavawnĂŒro|gokishavavawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavawnĂŒmu|shavavawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavawnknĂŒmu|goshavavawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavawnĂŒmu|gokishavavawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavavawshĂ«nĂŒ|shavavawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavavawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavavawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavavawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavawshĂ«ro|shavavawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavawnkshĂ«ro|goshavavawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavawshĂ«ro|gokishavavawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavawshĂ«mu|shavavawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavawnkshĂ«mu|goshavavawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavawshĂ«mu|gokishavavawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavavawronĂŒ|shavavawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavavawnkronĂŒ|goshavavawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavawronĂŒ|gokishavavawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavavawroshĂ«|shavavawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavavawnkroshĂ«|goshavavawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavavawroshĂ«|gokishavavawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavawromu|shavavawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavawnkromu|goshavavawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavawromu|gokishavavawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavavawmunĂŒ|shavavawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavavawnkmunĂŒ|goshavavawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavawmunĂŒ|gokishavavawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavavawmushĂ«|shavavawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavavawnkmushĂ«|goshavavawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavavawmushĂ«|gokishavavawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavawmuro|shavavawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavawnkmuro|goshavavawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavawmuro|gokishavavawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
